name: Blob Slime
notes: Tutorial slime — always the first encountered

notes: Zone 1 secret — tap the ancient oak 30 times

name: Spelunker Slime
notes: Zone 2 secret — reach 10000 Goo while in Crystal Caves

name: Fire Drake Slime
notes: Zone 3 secret — survive 60s without spending Goo

name: Frostbite Slime
notes: Zone 4 secret — have 5 ice-type slimes active simultaneously

name: Jungle Heart Slime
notes: Zone 5 secret — complete all Zone 5 breeds

name: Flintfire Slime
notes: Same-biome: Meadow — first hint of fire

name: Steam Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Ember x Frost — fire+ice = steam

name: Frost Drake Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Ember x Frost — biome apex cross

name: Volcanic Mycelium Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Ember x Verdant — biome apex cross

name: Celestial Fire Drake Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Ember x Starfall — biome apex cross

name: Glacier Jungle Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Frost x Verdant — biome apex cross

name: Ice Sovereign Celestial Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Frost x Starfall — biome apex cross

name: Celestial Grove Slime
notes: Cross-biome: Verdant x Starfall — biome apex cross

name: Jungle Overmind Slime
notes: Chain Breed — two same-biome — zone 5 pinnacle

name: Celestial Singularity Slime
notes: Chain Breed — two same-biome — zone 6 pinnacle

name: Harmonic Slime
notes: Mythic chain — harmony of sound and stars

name: The Great Slime
notes: Mythic pinnacle — final breed in the game

name: Mudslime
notes: Failed breed result — incompatible parents produce this

name: Mirror Slime
notes: Breed a slime with the result of breeding that slime — self-reflective chain

name: Glitch Slime
notes: Tap the main blob exactly 999 times without spending any Goo

name: Lucky Slime
notes: 0.1% chance to appear on any successful breed

name: Oversized Slime
notes: Triggered by having 100+ slimes in collection simultaneously

name: Miniature Slime
notes: Triggered when any slime reaches level 10 for the first time

name: Elder Slime
notes: A single slime remains at max level for 24 real-world hours

name: Haunted Slime
notes: Discovered in Frostmere — breed any two slimes after midnight local time

name: Curious Slime
notes: Tap the same slime 50 consecutive times without tapping anything else

name: Slime King
notes: Unlock all 25 Zone 3 slimes (all of Ember Wastes)

name: Slime Queen
notes: Unlock all 25 Zone 4 slimes (all of Frostmere)

name: Cosmic Jester Slime
notes: Breed any slime with a Mudslime

name: Primordial Goo
notes: Collect all 6 zone apex Epics: Meadow Crown + Sapphire Heart + Hellfire + Frostbite Sovereign + Jungle Sovereign + Cosmic Singularity

name: The Great Slime (True Form)
notes: Complete the Slimepedia — collect all 526 other slimes. This is the true ending.
